subject: Research AG-UI, A2UI, MCP, and agentic UI protocols
description: Deep dive into the emerging protocols for AI-agent-to-UI communication: AG-UI protocol, A2UI, MCP apps, structured tool outputs, streaming tool calls, agent-as-frontend patterns. These are the new primitives for a framework.
activeForm: Research AG-UI, A2UI, MCP, and agentic UI protocols
